channel.title: GeoPulse — Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefs on geopolitics, geography, and world history.

item.title: Melania Trump's speech propels Epstein crisis back to forefront
item.description: She has now placed herself squarely into the Epstein story and at odds with the administration, which wants to end the investigation. She has now placed herself squarely into the Epstein story and at odds with the administration, which wants to end the investigation. Melania Trump's speech propels Epstein crisis back to forefront She has now placed herself squarely into the Epstein story and at odds with the administration, which wants to end the investigation. Melania Trump's speech propels Epstein crisis back to forefront

item.title: Title: Artemis II astronauts journey back to Earth after Moon mission
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II astronauts have returned to Earth after completing the first crewed lunar mission in 53 years. NASA’s Artemis II astronauts have returned to Earth after completing the first crewed lunar mission in 53 years. Title: Artemis II astronauts journey back to Earth after Moon mission NASA’s Artemis II astronauts have returned to Earth after completing the first crewed lunar mission in 53 years. Title: Artemis II astronauts journey back to Earth after Moon mission NASA’s Artemis II astronauts have returned to Earth after completing the first crewed lunar mission in 53 years. Title: Artemis II astronauts journey back

item.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz to reopen ‘soon’ as US, Iran head to talks
item.description: Trump says Washington will not accept Iran's imposition of a de facto toll booth system in the critical waterway. Trump says Washington will not accept Iran's imposition of a de facto toll booth system in the critical waterway. Trump says Strait of Hormuz to reopen ‘soon’ as US, Iran head to talks Trump says Washington will not accept Iran's imposition of a de facto toll booth system in the critical waterway. Trump says Strait of Hormuz to reopen ‘soon’ as US, Iran head to talks

item.title: Moment Artemis II splashes down after moon mission
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II astronauts have safely splashed down on Earth, completing a landmark mission. NASA’s Artemis II astronauts have safely splashed down on Earth, completing a landmark mission. Moment Artemis II splashes down after moon mission NASA’s Artemis II astronauts have safely splashed down on Earth, completing a landmark mission. Moment Artemis II splashes down after moon mission NASA’s Artemis II astronauts have safely splashed down on Earth, completing a landmark mission. Moment Artemis II splashes down after moon mission

item.title: Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán scents victory
item.description: As Péter Magyar's opposition movement leads in the polls, tens of thousands of anti-Orbán supporters fill Heroes' Square in Budapest. As Péter Magyar's opposition movement leads in the polls, tens of thousands of anti-Orbán supporters fill Heroes' Square in Budapest. Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán scents victory As Péter Magyar's opposition movement leads in the polls, tens of thousands of anti-Orbán supporters fill Heroes' Square in Budapest. Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán scents victory

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II astronauts splash down on Earth after lunar mission
item.description: Crew safely complete first mission to travel around the Moon in more than 50 years. Crew safely complete first mission to travel around the Moon in more than 50 years. NASA’s Artemis II astronauts splash down on Earth after lunar mission Crew safely complete first mission to travel around the Moon in more than 50 years. NASA’s Artemis II astronauts splash down on Earth after lunar mission Crew safely complete first mission to travel around the Moon in more than 50 years. NASA’s Artemis II astronauts splash down on Earth after lunar mission

item.title: Iran war live: US negotiators due to arrive in Pakistan for ceasefire talks
item.description: Lebanese Health Ministry says people killed in Israeli attacks since March 2 rises to 1,953 with 6,303 wounded. Lebanese Health Ministry says people killed in Israeli attacks since March 2 rises to 1,953 with 6,303 wounded. Iran war live: US negotiators due to arrive in Pakistan for ceasefire talks Lebanese Health Ministry says people killed in Israeli attacks since March 2 rises to 1,953 with 6,303 wounded. Iran war live: US negotiators due to arrive in Pakistan for ceasefire talks

item.title: Israeli strike on government building kills Lebanese officers
item.description: Israeli air strike on a government building in southern Lebanon’s Nabatieh kills at least 13. Israeli air strike on a government building in southern Lebanon’s Nabatieh kills at least 13. Israeli strike on government building kills Lebanese officers Israeli air strike on a government building in southern Lebanon’s Nabatieh kills at least 13. item.title: Lyse Doucet: Historic US-Iran talks must bridge deep distrust
item.description: Face-to-face talks would mark the highest-level engagement between Iran and the US since the 1979 Islamic Revolution. Face-to-face talks would mark the highest-level engagement between Iran and the US since the 1979 Islamic Revolution. Lyse Doucet: Historic US-Iran talks must bridge deep distrust Face-to-face talks would mark the highest-level engagement between Iran and the US since the 1979 Islamic Revolution. Lyse Doucet: Historic US-Iran talks must bridge deep distrust

item.title: Brazil announces US partnership to intercept weapons, drug trafficking
item.description: President Lula's government said it has seized 1,168 illicit arms imported from the US in the last 12 months alone. President Lula's government said it has seized 1,168 illicit arms imported from the US in the last 12 months alone. Brazil announces

item.title: Colombia responds to Ecuador’s tariff hike with 100-percent import tax
item.description: The tit-for-tat tariff increase comes amid cross-border tension over illicit drugs and fate of politician Jorge Glas. The tit-for-tat tariff increase comes amid cross-border tension over illicit drugs and fate of politician Jorge Glas. Colombia responds to Ecuador’s tariff hike with 100-percent import tax The tit-for-tat tariff increase comes amid cross-border tension over illicit drugs and fate of politician Jorge Glas. item.title: Hezbollah rocket attack damages 1,500-year-old Israeli church
item.description: Hezbollah fired a barrage of rockets at northern Israel, damaging a 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya. Hezbollah fired a barrage of rockets at northern Israel, damaging a 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya. Hezbollah rocket attack damages 1,500-year-old Israeli church Hezbollah fired a barrage of rockets at northern Israel, damaging a 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya. Hezbollah rocket attack damages 1,500-year-old Israeli church

item.title: Lebanon and Israel officials to meet in US on Tuesday
item.description: A senior Lebanese official earlier told the BBC that Lebanon would only take part in talks if a ceasefire was in place. A senior Lebanese official earlier told the BBC that Lebanon would only take part in talks if a ceasefire was in place. Lebanon and Israel officials to meet in US on Tuesday A senior Lebanese official earlier told the BBC that Lebanon would only take part in talks if a ceasefire was in place. Lebanon and Israel officials to meet in US on Tuesday

item.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman’s home targeted in Molotov cocktail attack
item.description: Police said the suspect targeted Altman's San Francisco residence before dawn and fled the scene on foot. Police said the suspect targeted Altman's San Francisco residence before dawn and fled the scene on foot. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman’s home targeted in Molotov cocktail attack Police said the suspect targeted Altman's San Francisco residence before dawn and fled the scene on foot. item.title: Irish government prepares fuel support deal after blockade pressure
item.description: Travel across parts of the Republic of Ireland was affected for the fourth day in a row as vehicles, including tractors, blocked roads. Travel across parts of the Republic of Ireland was affected for the fourth day in a row as vehicles, including tractors, blocked roads. Irish government prepares fuel support deal after blockade pressure Travel across parts of the Republic of Ireland was affected for the fourth day in a row as vehicles, including tractors, blocked roads. Irish government prepares fuel support deal after blockade pressure

item.title: Gunmen kill at least four people at Afghanistan picnic spot
item.description: Officials say attackers opened fire near the village of Deh Mehri in Herat. Officials say attackers opened fire near the village of Deh Mehri in Herat. item.title: South Korea deploys thermal imaging cameras in search for escaped zoo wolf
item.description: The male wolf, named Neukgu, escaped a zoo in the central city of Daejeon on Wednesday, officials said. The male wolf, named Neukgu, escaped a zoo in the central city of Daejeon on Wednesday, officials said. item.title: Palestinian shot dead during Israeli settler attack on occupied West Bank village
item.description: The killing came as ex-security chiefs warned "government sponsored Jewish terrorism" was out of control. The killing came as ex-security chiefs warned "government sponsored Jewish terrorism" was out of control. item.title: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers
item.description: The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years. The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years. Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years. Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years. Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers

item.title: Man accused of coercing wife into sex with 120 men goes on trial in Sweden
item.description: The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers. The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers. Man accused of coercing wife into sex with 120 men goes on trial in Sweden The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers.
